name: chartlibrary-mcp
summary: Chart Library MCP Server — intelligence layer for stock pattern agents. 18 tools: cohort retrieval (search, cohort, cohort_analyze), Layer 5 memory (symbol_intelligence, similar_cohorts, cohort_compare, discover_picks), realtime News v2 (narrative_pulse, narrative_alerts), analysis (analyze, context, explain, portfolio, anchor_fetch, decompose, clusters, live_search). Combined conviction = cohort_score + news pulse boost. +19.5pp quintile spread on n=1094.
